queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account correlates with reduced credit default probability and serves as a mitigating factor in consumer credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default risk: empirical evidence on how critical or multiple existing credit accounts influence lower credit default probability in lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: investigating the relationship between negative checking account balances and decreased default probability in consumer credit modeling.
